name: ETH Compression Hold Release v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for testing a squeeze-release structure that enters only after post-release value hold. The edge should come from broad compression-release participation with realistic asymmetric harvesting rather than worshipping the first breakout bar.
invalidation_condition: Abort if squeeze-release setups remain too sparse, if release bars instantly mean-revert before hold is visible, or if the exit structure cannot overcome costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Compression resolves into a directional release, and entry is only taken if price remains aligned with fast value rather than snapping back immediately.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in chop, some compression releases persist for a brief second leg. The goal here is to monetize that short-lived persistence with realistic front-loaded exits.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is a cleaner lane for this than TAO because squeeze and hold structure is easier to read while still offering meaningful range expansion.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If compression resolves straight back into mean reversion, the release will not persist long enough to justify even the front-half targets.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries engage but the hold never extends, keep the entry and compress exits further rather than tightening setup conditions.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; squeeze and hold are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate compression thresholds instead of extreme squeeze-only definitions

long: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on close back through EMA_55 or 4 bars
